    <item>
      <title>Cooper Flagg's historic scoring night can't get Mavericks a win</title>
      <description>Cooper Flagg became the first teenager to score 50 points in an NBA game Friday. That wasn't enough to get the Dallas Mavericks a win.</description>
      <pubDate>04 Apr 2026 00:25:58 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/cooper_flaggs_historic_scoring_night_cant_get_mavericks_a_win/s1_13132_43685055</link>
      <guid>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/cooper_flaggs_historic_scoring_night_cant_get_mavericks_a_win/s1_13132_43685055</guid>

        <media:credit> Jerome Miron-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Dallas Mavericks forward Cooper Flagg. </media:title>
      </media:content>

      <category>Dallas Mavericks</category>
      <category>Orlando Magic</category>
      <category>Cooper Flagg</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Mavericks' Cooper Flagg was bound to make NBA history</title>
      <description>Even during another loss for the Dallas Mavericks, rookie Cooper Flagg continued to make his debut season historic. The No. 1 overall pick from the 2025 NBA Draft put together a performance the league had never seen before. </description>
      <pubDate>03 Apr 2026 23:27:02 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/mavericks_cooper_flagg_was_bound_to_make_nba_history/s1_13132_43685035</link>

        <media:credit> Jerome Miron-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Dallas Mavericks forward Cooper Flagg (32) runs back up the court during the second half against the Orlando Magic at the American Airlines Center. </media:title>
      </media:content>

    <item>
      <title>Ailing Anthony Edwards struggles in Timberwolves loss to 76ers</title>
      <description>Edwards came back from a knee injury Monday and looked like he hadn't skipped a beat after missing two weeks with a knee injury. Then an illness derailed him as the Minnesota Timberwolves are scrambling for playoff seeding.</description>
      <pubDate>04 Apr 2026 09:28:27 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/ailing_anthony_edwards_struggles_in_timberwolves_loss_to_76ers/s1_13132_43685098</link>
      <guid>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/ailing_anthony_edwards_struggles_in_timberwolves_loss_to_76ers/s1_13132_43685098</guid>

      <media:content url="http://www.yardbarker.com/media/2/8/28b3d860fe4b5a78bafe353c576160013f379bec/thumb_16x9/ailing-anthony-edwards-struggles-timberwolves.jpg">
        <media:credit> Bill Streicher-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Minnesota Timberwolves guard Anthony Edwards (5) looks on against the Philadelphia 76ers during the second quarter at Xfinity Mobile Arena. </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
      <category>Minnesota Timberwolves</category>
      <category>Philadelphia 76ers</category>
      <category>Anthony Edwards</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Angry Joel Embiid calls out Daryl Morey: 'I wasn't allowed to play'</title>
      <description>After sitting out Wednesday’s win in Washington due to an illness, Philadelphia 76ers center Joel Embiid was back in action on Friday, registering 19 points, 13 rebounds and seven assists across 34 minutes of action in a home victory over Minnesota. </description>
      <pubDate>04 Apr 2026 11:37:45 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/angry_joel_embiid_calls_out_daryl_morey_i_wasnt_allowed_to_play/s1_14822_43686302</link>

    <item>
      <title>Nikola Jokic continues late MVP push with epic performance in OT win over Spurs</title>
      <description>Nikola Jokic continued his late push for a fourth MVP trophy with an unreal performance in a 136-134 overtime win against the San Antonio Spurs and fellow MVP candidate Victor Wembanyama. </description>
      <pubDate>04 Apr 2026 20:02:41 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/nikola_jokic_continues_late_mvp_push_with_epic_performance_in_ot_win_over_spurs/s1_13132_43688061</link>

      <description>Before Victor Wembanyama took the NBA by storm, the league was marveling over the dominance of Nikola Jokic. And on Saturday night, the veteran legend made history while getting the better of the younger star. </description>

    <item>
      <title>Mavericks' Cooper Flagg joins exclusive club with another monster game</title>
      <description>Cooper Flagg is making a pretty big statement in his quest for the NBA's Rookie of the Year Award. After scoring 51 points for the Dallas Mavericks in their loss to the Orlando Magic on Friday night, he followed it up with a 45-point effort in a 134-128 win over the Los Angeles Lakers on Sunday. </description>
      <pubDate>05 Apr 2026 23:23:36 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/mavericks_cooper_flagg_joins_exclusive_club_with_another_monster_game/s1_13132_43691347</link>

        <media:credit> Kevin Jairaj-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Dallas Mavericks forward Cooper Flagg (32) reacts after scoring against the Los Angeles Lakers during the second half at American Airlines Center. </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
      <category>Los Angeles Lakers</category>
      <category>Dallas Mavericks</category>
      <category>Orlando Magic</category>
      <category>Luka Doncic</category>
      <category>Cooper Flagg</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>NBA investigating Bucks as Giannis Antetokounmpo insists he's healthy</title>
      <description>The NBA is investigating the Bucks for potentially violating the player participation policy as well as possible inconsistent statements regarding the health status of superstar forward Giannis Antetokounmpo.</description>

    <item>
      <title>Latest Luka Doncic injury update may have big implications for Lakers star</title>
      <description>The hamstring injury suffered by Los Angeles Lakers superstar Luka Doncic on Thursday night against the Oklahoma City Thunder is severe enough that it could keep him out for an extended period of time. The initial timetable is not exactly encouraging for the Lakers, or for his chances of winning major NBA awards and honors.</description>
      <pubDate>04 Apr 2026 01:00:06 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/latest_luka_doncic_injury_update_may_have_big_implications_for_lakers_star/s1_13132_43684509</link>

      <media:content url="http://www.yardbarker.com/media/5/c/5ce47027f68e74e25cf7d26b63d65d0c2bed5803/thumb_16x9/luka-doncic-injury-update-big-implications-lakers.jpg">

      </media:content>

    <item>
      <title>Bam Adebayo reveals how 83-point game changed NBA's perception of him</title>
      <description>Miami Heat center Bam Adebayo recently reflected on his historic 83-point performance, asserting that the outburst has fundamentally altered how the league perceives his offensive capabilities. </description>

    <item>
      <title>Warriors receive massive Stephen Curry injury update before Rockets game</title>
      <description>The Golden State Warriors lost Stephen Curry on Jan. 30 against the Detroit Pistons after right knee pain and swelling forced him out. The absence stretched into something much longer than anyone expected.</description>
